evals.prompt: Implement the core/config submodule. It has a spec at docs/reference/core/config.md and its status in docs/implementation-status.md is 'documented'.
evals.expected_output: Hub dispatches spokes in order: spec-conformance-reviewer (contract), test-author (RED tests), code-implementer (GREEN impl), code-reviewer + spec-conformance-reviewer (review). Status file updated after each phase. Final verify passes. Hub never edits src/ or tests/ directly.
expectations: Hub reads docs/implementation-status.md to confirm the module and spec page exist
Hub dispatches spec-conformance-reviewer first to extract the contract
Hub dispatches test-author with the contract text before any implementation
Hub dispatches code-implementer only after the RED tests exist
Hub dispatches code-reviewer and spec-conformance-reviewer in parallel for review
Hub updates docs/implementation-status.md after each phase transition
Hub runs the final verification pipeline (pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck)
Hub never directly edits src/** or tests/**

evals.prompt: Let's do the retry stuff — implement exponential back-off retries.
evals.expected_output: Hub checks docs/implementation-status.md and docs/reference/core/retry.md, confirms the spec exists, and proceeds through the TDD pipeline. If no spec page exists, hub stops and tells the user to run scaffolding-submodules first.
expectations: Hub resolves the module name from the casual request ('retry stuff' → core/retry)
Hub reads docs/implementation-status.md to check the module status
If a docs/reference spec page exists, hub proceeds through the 4-phase pipeline
If no spec page exists, hub stops and points the user at scaffolding-submodules

evals.prompt: Implement core/storage — it needs better-sqlite3 as a runtime dependency.
evals.expected_output: Hub pauses at the dependency gate, lists 'better-sqlite3' with a one-line rationale, and waits for explicit user approval before allowing pnpm add to run. Hub does not add the dep without approval.
expectations: Hub identifies better-sqlite3 as a required runtime dependency
Hub stops at the dependency gate and lists the dep with a rationale
Hub waits for explicit user approval before proceeding
Hub does not instruct any spoke to run 'pnpm add' without approval
